t_ch: …「晨昏斗转，控驭浑象——」
t_en: ..."The turn of dawn and dusk, commanding the celestial globe..."

t_ch: 「拥抱阴云吧，『天象画壁』。」
t_en: "Embrace the clouds, Celestial Mural."

t_ch: 呵…瞧瞧我们逮住了谁，一个陈旧迂腐的旧神信徒！
t_en: Ha... look who we've caught — an old-fashioned disciple of the ancient god!

t_ch: 你那弱小的泰坦早已被强大的女武神征服，它现在的模样跟锻炉里经年累月沉积的废料无异。
t_en: The frail Titan was conquered long ago by the mighty warrior goddess. Now they're nothing more than rusted scrap, left in the forge to decay over countless years.

t_ch: 皈依我们吧，活在往日传统里的可怜人！我们会帮你修复愚钝的认知，让你能和同胞们共享塞涅俄丝的荣光……
t_en: Surrender to us, relic of a bygone era! We'll reshape your clouded mind and grant you a place alongside your kin in Seliose's glory...

t_ch: 你们所谓的「修复」，难道不是对心灵和肉体的双重折磨吗？
t_en: Your so-called "reshaping" is nothing more than torment, both in body and mind.

t_ch: 不…我宁愿就此死去，也不会屈服于你们这群假称信仰、恣意妄为的卑鄙狗鼠……
t_en: No... I'd rather die than give in to hypocrites like you, hiding behind empty faith and wielding power as you please!

t_ch: 哈…哈哈哈哈！看啊，你们都看到了吗——这迂腐的家伙，她是个多会引人发笑的虚伪之徒哪！
t_en: Hahaha! Take a good look at this pathetic fool! Do you see it? What a laughable hypocrite!

t_ch: 你是晖之民，对么…？
t_en: You're one of the Sunfolk, aren't you?

t_ch: 告诉我，在你们以信仰为由压迫手足同胞，令众生陷于无尽暴晒之苦时——可曾料想过，那轮烈日也有坠落的时刻？
t_en: When you oppressed your own under the guise of faith, leaving countless souls to suffer endlessly under the scorching sun — did you ever consider that even the fiercest sun could one day fall?

t_ch: 我…我曾以为……
t_en: I... I once thought...

t_ch: 省去无用的狡辩吧，活在旧世界的废人。「我宁愿就此死去，也不会屈服于你们这群假称信仰、恣意妄为的卑鄙狗鼠」——
t_en: Spare us your empty excuses, relic of the old world. "I'd rather die than give in to hypocrites like you, hiding behind empty faith and wielding power as you please!" —

t_ch: ——你刚刚已经给自己判了死刑，我们要做的事不过是顺水推舟而已。
t_en: — You've already sentenced yourself. All we're doing is following through.

t_ch: 动手吧，利落些。赏她的脖颈一个平整漂亮的切口。
t_en: Do it. Make it clean. A single, sharp cut across the neck.

t_ch: 不，不不…不！！！
t_en: No, no... NO!!!

t_ch: …刻法勒以自身为模捏塑出的造物，却唯独没能继承它的博爱和包容。
t_en: ...The creations shaped by Kephale in their image failed to inherit their compassion and acceptance.

t_ch: 你还好么，风堇？
t_en: Are you alright, Hyacine?

t_ch: 我没事，白厄阁下。我…大概也料想到了这个结果。
t_en: I'm fine, Lord Phainon. I... expected this.

t_ch: 只是联想到塞涅俄丝向泰坦宣战前怀揣的单纯愿景，这副画面会令我格外痛心……
t_en: It's just... thinking about the vision Seliose held before declaring war on the Titan... this sight is deeply heartbreaking.

t_ch: …我们继续吧。
t_en: ...Let's move on.

t_ch: 见证天空之子的真实历史。
t_en: Witness the true history of the Skyfolk.

t_ch: 聆听风堇的总结。
t_en: Listen to Hyacine's summary.

t_ch: 塞涅俄丝的胜利没能改变她的族人。一部分天空之民将她奉为新的神明，转而开始压迫不愿抛弃旧日信仰的人们……
t_en: Seliose's victory couldn't change her people. Some Skyfolk revered her as a new goddess, and began to oppress those unwilling to abandon their old beliefs...

t_ch: 她向泰坦宣战前怀揣的单纯愿景，全都化作了泡影。
t_en: The simple vision she carried with her before declaring war on the Titans... became an illusion.

t_ch: 我们…继续吧。
t_en: Let's... keep going.

t_ch: …「晨昏斗转，控驭浑象——」
t_en: ..."The turn of dawn and dusk, commanding the celestial globe..."

t_ch: 「驱赶神明吧，『天象画壁』。」
t_en: "Drive out the gods, Celestial Mural."

t_ch: 那该不会是……
t_en: Could that be...

t_ch: 这…怎么可能？
t_en: But... how is that possible?

t_ch: 请帮帮我们，请拯救我们这些被遗弃的天空之子……
t_en: Please... help us, the forsaken Skyfolk...

t_ch: …凯妮斯阁下，遵行阴影之道的强者。
t_en: ...Lady Caenis, you are the strong one who follows the path of shadows.

t_ch: 是「清洗者」…！难道天空之子和他们勾结在了一起？
t_en: The "Cleaners"...! Did the Skyfolk conspire with them?

t_ch: 我们已经听闻，你们以流着黄金血的异人作为猎物，志在清洗那些诅咒之子给世间带来的污秽。
t_en: Word has it you hunt those with golden blood, all in your quest to cleanse the world of the filth of those cursed offspring.

t_ch: 请为我们主持正义吧，那流着金血的魔女偷袭了骄傲的晨昏之眼，践踏了它尊贵的神格。而神明陨落的代价，竟要由我等虔信的天空子民来偿付！
t_en: Deliver justice for us. The witch with golden blood struck down the proud Eye of Twilight, desecrating their divine grace. Yet, it is we, the devout denizens of the sky, who are forced to pay the price!

t_ch: 我能嗅到你们的绝望，天空之子…清洗者与凡人站在统一战线，我们会协助各位铲除那渎神的混血儿。
t_en: I can smell your despair, Skyfolk... The Cleaners are on the side of mortals. Together, we'll erase that blasphemous bloodline from this world.

t_ch: 但「阳雷骑士」和她的异兽太过强大，没人能从正面战胜他们。因此，我们会教给各位一切能够活用的「计谋」……
t_en: The Daythunder Knight and her fantastic creatures are far too strong. No one can hope to defeat them in a direct fight. But we'll show you every trick, every strategy you can use to turn the tide...

t_ch: 为了反抗，那些旧日的信众不择手段，甚至不惜与清洗者合作……
t_en: In their desperation, those ancient disciples were willing to do anything — even ally themselves with the Cleaners.

t_ch: 但我猜他们没能成功，对么？
t_en: But I'm guessing their plan failed, didn't it?

t_ch: 那些刺客刻毒，但不愚蠢。他们从未敢打过塞涅俄丝的主意。
t_en: Those assassins were vicious, but not foolish. They never actually dared to attack Seliose.

t_ch: 他们并非出自真心实意帮助受压迫者。他们真正想要「清洗」的，是混藏于天空之子中的无辜黄金裔。
t_en: They weren't driven by any genuine desire to help the oppressed. Their true targets were the innocent Chrysos Heirs hidden among the Skyfolk.

t_ch: 但这背后的一切阴谋，我们都是后来才得以知晓。
t_en: These schemes only came to light long after the damage was done.

t_ch: 逐火之旅开启前，黄金裔曾为争夺神谕的「正统」掀起战争，缇宝老师的众多分身也曾受到牵连。
t_en: Before the Flame-Chase Journey began, the Chrysos Heirs waged war against each other over who was a "legitimate" heir of the prophecy. Even Tribbie's many selves were pulled into the chaos.

t_ch: 彼时的人们会将黄金血视为诅咒…情有可原。
t_en: At the time, golden blood was seen as a curse. Honestly? It's easy to see why.

t_ch: 可塞涅俄丝，她在哪里…那时的她，究竟是以怎样的复杂心情看待这一切发生呢？
t_en: But Seliose... where was she in all of this? What thoughts weighed on her mind as she watched everything unfold?

t_ch: 你马上就会知晓了，风堇姑娘。
t_en: You'll know very soon, Miss Hyacine.

t_ch: 见证天空之子的真实历史。
t_en: Witness the true history of the Skyfolk.

t_ch: 聆听风堇的总结。
t_en: Listen to Hyacine's summary.

t_ch: 受到残害的旧信徒不惜与清洗者合作，但那些刺客从未想过正面招惹强大的塞涅俄丝，只将匕首对准了混藏于天空之子中的无辜黄金裔……
t_en: The oppressed old believers didn't hesitate to team up with the Cleaners, but those assassins had never thought of directly provoking the mighty Seliose. Instead, they trained their daggers on the innocent Chrysos Heirs hidden in the Skyfolk's midst...

t_ch: 塞涅俄丝…那时的她，究竟是以怎样的复杂心情看待这一切发生呢？
t_en: Seliose... how exactly would she have felt to witness all this transpire?

t_ch: 你马上就会知晓了，风堇姑娘。
t_en: You'll know very soon, Miss Hyacine.

t_ch: 见证天空之子的真实历史。
t_en: Witness the true history of the Skyfolk.

t_ch: 聆听风堇的总结。
t_en: Listen to Hyacine's summary.

t_ch: 对人子感到绝望的塞涅俄丝给天空之子降下了死刑，将他们抛入了我们脚下滚烫的黄金池中……
t_en: Seliose gave up on the children of humanity, and handed the Skyfolk a death sentence... throwing them into the boiling pool of gold beneath our feet...

t_ch: 而后，她选择了与艾格勒融为一体，彻底摒弃了折磨她一生的人性。
t_en: ...And then she chose to merge with Aquila, casting aside once and for all the humanity that tormented her all her life.

t_ch: 如果这是她选择的道路，那我和先祖们…我们究竟在守望谁的夙愿？！
t_en: If this was the path she chose, then whose wish have my ancestors and I been guarding all this time!?

t_ch: 最后一枚历史的碎片就在前方。去拾起它吧，风堇姑娘。
t_en: The final fragment of history lies just ahead. Go and claim it, Miss Hyacine.

t_ch: 和彼时的塞涅俄丝一样，你也必须踏出这一步。
t_en: Just as Seliose once did, you must take this step too.

t_ch: …「晨昏斗转，控驭浑象——」
t_en: ..."The turn of dawn and dusk, commanding the celestial globe..."

t_ch: 「揭露历史吧，『天象画壁』。」
t_en: "Reveal the history, Celestial Mural."

t_ch: 这么一来，你就无处可藏了…泰坦。
t_en: Now, you have nowhere to hide... Titan.

t_ch: 看，你们快看那边——
t_en: Look, everyone, over there —

t_ch: 那是…露奈比斯和索拉比斯阁下？
t_en: Are those... Lady Lunabis and Lord Solabis?

t_ch: 嗯，应该是他们千年前留下的残忆。
t_en: Yes, those are remnants of their memories from a thousand years ago.

t_ch: 翼兽大人，你们…你们想做什么？！
t_en: Your Highness, what are you planning to do!?

t_ch: 我们是塞涅俄丝大人的虔诚信众…我们绝不会背弃她！反倒是这群鼠辈…他们才是背刺英雄的愚氓！
t_en: We are devout disciples of Lady Seliose... We would never betray her! It's those rats... they are the fools who backstabbed our hero!

t_ch: 请饶过我们吧！我们为仇恨冲昏了头脑，才会被那群黑衣人带入歧途……
t_en: Please spare us! We were blinded by hatred and misled by those people clothed in black.

t_ch: 请惩罚他们吧，翼兽大人！没有这群冥顽不灵的前代渣滓，天空之子才能真正团结在女武神的身边！
t_en: Punish them, Your Highness! Without these stubborn remnants of the past, the Skyfolk may finally stand united under the warrior goddess's banner!

t_ch: 强者欺压弱者；信仰成为迫害的借口。
t_en: The strong crush the weak, twisting faith into a tool for oppression.

t_ch: 弱者成为强者；仇恨的轮回亘古不变。
t_en: The weak rise to power, yet the cycle of hatred endures, unbroken through time.

t_ch: 塞涅俄丝已经做出宣判——
t_en: Seliose has made her judgment —

t_ch: ——人子的卑污是无可挽回的死疾。
t_en: — The corruption within humanity is a sickness beyond cure.

t_ch: 但她曾那样炽烈地爱着世人……
t_en: Yet she once loved us with such fierce devotion...

t_ch: 她已经…放弃我们了吗？
t_en: Has she... given up on us?

t_ch: 塞涅俄丝触碰了火种，她获得了泰坦的视野。
t_en: Seliose touched the Coreflame and gained the vision of the Titan.

t_ch: 她看到了神明畏惧之物——那扎根于黑暗之中，自世界的边缘滋生并吞噬一切的黑潮。
t_en: She saw what the god fears — rooted in the darkness, spawning from the edge of the world, the black tide that devours all.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>它逃避阴云的追逐，并非出于对烈日的偏袒，而仅是畏惧那无边的黑暗。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>They flee from the clouds not out of favoritism toward the scorching sun, but merely out of fear of that boundless shadow.</color>

t_ch: 而人子却私自误读神明的意图，将之铸成自相残杀的锐器……
t_en: Yet humanity misinterpreted the god's intentions, forging them into weapons for fratricide...

t_ch: …这段由悲痛和惨剧酿成的历史，将以此作结。
t_en: ...This history, brewed from sorrow and tragedy, shall end here.

t_ch: 女武神在上……
t_en: In the name of the warrior goddess...

t_ch: 她究竟…为我们编织了怎样的命运…？
t_en: What kind of fate has she woven for us...?

t_ch: 塞涅俄丝带给凡人的寄语，由我们代为传达——
t_en: We are here to deliver the message Seliose left for mortals —

t_ch: 「我曾深爱的，却无力拯救的同胞们啊——」
t_en: "To my once beloved, yet now unsavable kin —"

t_ch: 「如今，金色的神血在我体内汹涌沸腾，天空的暴君也对我俯首称臣。我的光芒比烈日更凶猛，笼罩思绪的阴霾终于散开——」
t_en: "With golden divine blood coursing through me, even the Tyrant of the Sky bends to my unyielding light. My light burns far brighter than before, and the fog clouding my mind has finally lifted —"

t_ch: 「当我透过神的百眼俯瞰这渺小的大地，我终于得以下定决心。英雄的本能在驱使着我，为你们宣读命运的审判——」
t_en: "I gaze upon this fragile earth through the god's hundred eyes, and resolution fills me. A hero's instinct drives me forward, compelling me to deliver your final judgment —"

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「你们的未来，就流淌于脚底那炽热滚烫的金池之间——」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Your future flows between the boiling streams of the golden pool at your feet —"</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「欢欣雀跃吧，因为当众人的骨血与液态的黄金溶于一体——」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Rejoice, for as everyone's flesh and blood merge with liquid gold —"</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「你们终将理解何为真正的团结。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"You will finally understand what true unity means."</color>

t_ch: 呵…我早已预料到这一天的到来。
t_en: Ha... I've long seen this day coming.

t_ch: 但这并非你的过失，塞涅俄丝。你唯一的错谬……
t_en: This isn't your fault, Seliose. Your only mistake...

t_ch: …便是对「人」倾注了太多奢侈的期望啊。
t_en: ...was placing far too much hope in humanity.

t_ch: 露奈比斯、索拉比斯，你们……
t_en: Lunabis, Solabis, you...

t_ch: 对，我们充当了塞涅俄丝的处刑官。
t_en: Yes, we acted as Seliose's executioners.

t_ch: 那一日，无数天空之子自晨昏之眼的穹顶坠落，被金色的熔岩吞噬。
t_en: That day, countless Skyfolk fell from the dome of the Eye of Twilight, swallowed by golden lava.

t_ch: 他们终其一生都在向天空祈祷，但虔诚却未能换来挣命的羽翼。
t_en: They spent their entire lives praying to the sky, yet their devotion never earned them wings to escape their fate.

t_ch: 塞涅俄丝…像变了个人。
t_en: Seliose... was like a completely different person.

t_ch: 了解到她所经历的一切以后……
t_en: After learning about everything she went through...

t_ch: 我只感到惋惜…但无法谴责她的选择。
t_en: I can only feel regret... but I can't condemn her choice.

t_ch: 说实话，能理解她。
t_en: Honestly, I understand her.

t_ch: 了解到她所经历的一切以后……
t_en: After learning about everything she went through...

t_ch: 我和你的看法一致，{NICKNAME}。
t_en: I feel the same way as you, {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 如果这就是历史的真面目，那塞涅俄丝和艾格勒的融合…难道也并非是为了让世人免受天灾？
t_en: If this is the true history — was Seliose's fusion with Aquila truly meant to save humanity from ruin?

t_ch: 触碰火种以后，塞涅俄丝不止理解了泰坦的恐惧，还看到了它的漠然。
t_en: By touching the Coreflame, Seliose gained insight into the Titan's fear... and glimpsed their cold indifference.

t_ch: 艾格勒从未渴求过凡人的虔信，天空文明的建立不过是人子自行其是的结果。神话中由泰坦赠予天空之子的浑象仪，实则也是凡人的发明。
t_en: Aquila never yearned for mortal devotion. The establishment of the sky civilization was merely the result of humanity's own doing. The celestial globe, said to be gifted by the Titan to the Skyfolk in the myths, was in truth a creation of mortals.

t_ch: 对人性彻底失望的塞涅俄丝，开始憧憬神性的淡漠。她遣使我和露奈比斯飞向大地，去寻找传闻中能将人类与泰坦的灵魂融为一体的禁术。
t_en: Disillusioned with humanity, Seliose began to long for the detachment of divinity. She sent Lunabis and me to the earth in search of a forbidden art said to fuse human and Titan souls.

t_ch: 那刻夏老师的炼金术…竟在千年前就曾发挥过如此作用么？
t_en: Professor Anaxa's alchemy already achieved such power a thousand years ago?

t_ch: 给天空之子降下死刑的塞涅俄丝，抛弃了人性的塞涅俄丝——
t_en: Seliose, who passed fatal judgment on the Skyfolk, had turned her back on humanity —

t_ch: 如果这是她选择的道路，那我和先祖们…我们究竟在守望谁的夙愿？！
t_en: If this was the path she chose, then whose wish have my ancestors and I been guarding all this time!?

t_ch: 最后一枚历史的碎片就在前方。去拾起它吧，风堇姑娘。
t_en: The final fragment of history lies just ahead. Go and claim it, Miss Hyacine.

t_ch: 和彼时的塞涅俄丝一样，你也必须踏出这一步。
t_en: Just as Seliose once did, you must take this step too.

t_ch: 抛弃了人性的塞涅俄丝…我和昏光庭院的先祖，真的是她留下的血脉吗？
t_en: Seliose had abandoned her humanity... Then, my Twilight Courtyard ancestors... and me... Are we truly her descendants?

t_ch: 真相很快就能被揭开了。无论如何…我都不会逃避使命。
t_en: The truth will soon be revealed. No matter what... I will not run away from my mission.

t_ch: 灰宝，你会站在我身边吗？
t_en: Grayie, will you stand by my side?

t_ch: 直面历史，然后挑战神明吧！
t_en: Confront history and rise to challenge the gods!

t_ch: 再整理一下心情吧，风堇。
t_en: Take a moment to gather your thoughts, Hyacine.

t_ch: 嗯，你说得对…我们都需要一些时间做好准备。
t_en: You're right... we all need some time to prepare.

t_ch: 那是……
t_en: Is that...

t_ch: 伟大的塞涅俄丝，我恳求你放过一条卑微的性命！
t_en: Great Seliose, I beg you — spare this humble life!

t_ch: 我从未伤害过任何人…你出于愤怒降下的惩罚，与我这无辜之人太过严苛！
t_en: I've never harmed anyone... The punishment you deliver out of rage is far too harsh for someone innocent like me!

t_ch: 时候到了，凡人——
t_en: The time has come, mortal —

t_ch: ——你该拥抱自己的命运了。
t_en: — it's time to face your destiny.

t_ch: 等等！女武神大人…请允许我同她对话！
t_en: Wait! Please, let me speak with Her Highness, the warrior goddess!

t_ch: 看啊，你们看到了吗？从我的伤口里渗出的是金色的血液！没错，我也是一名黄金裔…我和塞涅俄丝大人同为被神谕选中之人！
t_en: Look! Can you see it? Golden blood is spilling from my wounds! I am a Chrysos Heir too... chosen by the prophecy, just like Lady Seliose!

t_ch: 她没有撒谎……
t_en: She isn't lying...

t_ch: 塞涅俄丝，你想如何处置自己的同胞？
t_en: Seliose, what will you do with one of your own?

t_ch: 黄金裔……
t_en: A Chrysos Heir...

t_ch: 你与他人…并无不同。
t_en: You are no different from the rest.

t_ch: 你曾是一名烈阳之子…当你的族人以泰坦的偏袒为由，用尽手段欺压他族时…你可曾为弱者挺身而出？
t_en: You were once one of the Sunborn... Did you ever rise to defend the weak when your kin oppressed others under the guise of the Titan's favor?

t_ch: 我…没有。
t_en: I... did not.

t_ch: 艾格勒陨落以后，你改变了信仰，奉我为新的神明。
t_en: You abandoned your old faith and made me your new god after Aquila's fall.

t_ch: 当你的同僚将刀刃对准不愿皈依的旧信徒…你可曾向他们伸出援手？
t_en: Did you offer your help when your comrades turned their blades on the faithful who refused to convert?

t_ch: 我…没有。
t_en: I... did not.

t_ch: 当创世神谕传入众生的耳中，引导黄金裔成为这破碎世界的英雄……
t_en: When the Prophecy of Genesis reached all beings, calling the Chrysos Heirs to become heroes of this fractured world...

t_ch: …你可曾战胜内心的软弱，响应它迫切的召唤？
t_en: ...did you overcome your inner weakness and heed its urgent call?

t_ch: 我…没能做到。
t_en: I... failed to do so.

t_ch: 看吧，黄金裔…你与那些卑劣之人并无不同。
t_en: Look, Chrysos Heir... you are no different from the rest...

t_ch: 我的审判是公正的，只有滚烫的黄金方能净化你们的原罪……
t_en: My judgment is just — only burning gold can purify your sins...

t_ch: …等等，塞涅俄丝大人——请允许我再为自己的懦弱辩护几句吧！
t_en: ...Wait, Lady Seliose — please, grant me a moment to explain my cowardice!

t_ch: 您的神性确实将凡庸们映衬得无比丑陋…但人子于这世间踽踽而行千万载之久，尝尽了生命的困顿、看遍了可耻的缺陋……
t_en: Your divinity indeed casts our mediocrity in a harsh and unflattering light. Humanity has walked this earth for many ages, enduring life's struggles and witnessing its shameful imperfections...

t_ch: 即便如此，我们还是建立起了宏伟的城邦，繁盛的文明！即使常常深陷恶意的泥沼，我们依旧挣扎着爬行……
t_en: Yet, despite everything, we built great city-states and thriving civilizations! Even when trapped in the mud of malice, we continued to struggle and push forward...

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>因为除去那些肮脏的劣根，作为凡人…坚韧亦是我们集体的品德！</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Because beyond our flaws, the virtue that we all share is tenacity!</color>

t_ch: 哪怕要在此赌上我拥有的、以及尚未拥有的一切…我都必须在您面前跪坐乞怜，为自己争取一线生机…也为向您证明，凡人有能力救赎自己！
t_en: Even if it means risking everything I have and everything I have yet to gain... I must kneel before you, begging for a chance at life. I need to prove that mortals are capable of redemption!

t_ch: 这般义正词严地承认自身的懦弱…看来你已彻底抛弃了尊严。
t_en: To admit your weakness in such a righteous manner... it seems you have completely abandoned your dignity.

t_ch: 你说，你愿意抵押自己「尚未拥有的一切」……
t_en: You say you're willing to risk everything you've yet to gain...

t_ch: 说说看吧…让我听听那究竟是什么神奇的赌注。
t_en: Tell me... what kind of miraculous bet is that?

t_ch: 这很简单，塞涅俄丝大人……
t_en: It's simple, Lady Seliose...

t_ch: 若您愿放我一条生路，<color=#dbc291ff>我会让子子孙孙世代传颂您的史诗，直到末世掩埋所有文明和传说。</color>
t_en: Should you grant me a chance at life, <color=#dbc291ff>I will ensure that your epic is passed down through generations, sung by my descendants until the end times buries all civilizations and legends.</color>

t_ch: 如果传入你我耳中的救世神谕有万分之一的可能成为现实……
t_en: Should the Prophecy of Deliverance we've heard hold even the slightest chance of becoming reality...

t_ch: 那我的后人终有一日会回到此处，向您证明：哪怕在您眼中低劣残缺的凡人，也能拥有扛起世界的力量！
t_en: Then my descendants will return here one day to prove to you that even the flawed and imperfect mortals you disdain can bear the weight of the world!

t_ch: 呵…有趣。
t_en: Ha... interesting.

t_ch: 让她走吧，索拉比斯，露奈比斯。
t_en: Release her, Solabis, Lunabis.

t_ch: 从现在起，她和她的后裔将同时背负天空的赐福与身世的诅咒。无论要花上多久，我都会等待那命运之人的到来……
t_en: From now on, she and her descendants will carry both the sky's blessing and the curse of their history. No matter how long it takes, I will wait for the one who is destined to arrive...

t_ch: 届时，再让我好生嘲谑人子那被先祖叛卖的宿命吧。
t_en: When that time comes, I'll take pleasure in mocking these mortal children on how their progenitress sold their unborn lives.

t_ch: 传说的真实样貌…终于完整了。
t_en: The truth of the legend... is finally clear.

t_ch: 雅辛忒丝……
t_en: Hyacinthia...

t_ch: 我是…那位无名黄金裔的后裔？
t_en: Am I... the descendant of that nameless Chrysos Heir?

t_ch: 我们一族的血脉，并非继承自英雄……
t_en: Our lineage wasn't from the hero...

t_ch: …而是一位在她面前乞哀告怜的无名黄金裔。
t_en: ...but from a nameless Chrysos Heir who begged for mercy before her.

t_ch: 我和先祖们卑弱的性命…都只悬于塞涅俄丝的一念之间……
t_en: My whole clan's fragile mortal life... was simply spared on Seliose's whim...

t_ch: 不能屈服于她的蔑视。
t_en: We must not yield to her scorn.

t_ch: 她的判断也许没错，凡人确实身负诸多缺陷。但即便如此，人的尊严也不容践踏。
t_en: Her judgment may be true — mortals do have their flaws. But even so, human dignity must not be trampled.

t_ch: 人类没有她眼中那么不堪。
t_en: Humans aren't as contemptible as she thinks.

t_ch: 她目之所及皆是人犯下的罪恶——但我们会让她明白，那不是人的全部。
t_en: She sees only the sins we've committed, but we will make her understand that it's not all we are.

t_ch: 或许她心中还剩下一丝慈悲。
t_en: Perhaps there's a trace of compassion left in her.

t_ch: 她抛弃了凡人，拥抱了神性…她认为人子不值得拯救。
t_en: She turned her back on humanity and embraced divinity... She believes we're not worth saving.

t_ch: 索拉比斯、露奈比斯阁下——
t_en: Lord Solabis, Lady Lunabis —

t_ch: 请告诉我，你们在晨昏之眼守候了千年，只是为了见证那位黄金裔的后裔回到这里接受惩罚吗？
t_en: Tell me... did you wait for a thousand years at the Eye of Twilight... Just to witness that Chrysos Heir's child coming back to receive punishment?

t_ch: …岁月会改变许多事，孩子。
t_en: ...Time alters everything, child.

t_ch: 曾经，我们尚未学会阅读复杂的人性，塞涅俄丝的视线是我们了解人子的唯一窗口。
t_en: Once upon a time, we had not yet learned to read the complexities of human nature, and Seliose's perspective was our only window into understanding humanity.

t_ch: 她的话语就是一切：我们的指引、宽慰、命令、训诫。
t_en: Her words were everything to us: Our guide, comfort, command, and admonition.

t_ch: 直到她陷入沉默，我们才学会了用自己的感官去认识人类。
t_en: It wasn't until she fell silent that we learned to perceive humanity through our senses.

t_ch: 与黑潮抗争的岁月里…我们一直俯瞰着大地，观察着逐火之旅的进程。我们看到了英雄们为救世踏上没有归路的征程。
t_en: During our resistance against the black tide... we watched over the earth, observing the progress of the Flame-Chase Journey. We saw heroes embarking on a mission of deliverance from which they could not return.

t_ch: 塞涅俄丝未能见证的团结与希望，我们代她收入了眼中。
t_en: The unity and hope Seliose couldn't see... we've witnessed in her place.

t_ch: 我们改变了，年轻的雅辛忒丝。我们的守望不再是为了印证人的软弱……
t_en: We've changed, young Hyacinthia. Our watch isn't about proving humanity's weaknesses anymore...

t_ch: …而是为了企盼光芒的回归。
t_en: ...It's about waiting for the return of the light.

t_ch: 塞涅俄丝大人！无论现在你是否能听到，我都想把心中所想对你述说。
t_en: Lady Seliose! I want to tell you this! Doesn't matter if you can hear me or not!

t_ch: 我想让你知道：我很庆幸！庆幸自己是一位默默无闻的人子之后。
t_en: I want you to know that I am glad to be born as the child of a nameless and ordinary mortal!

t_ch: 正因如此，我才能够向你证明：人性根底那簇坚韧的希望，并不会被时光磨灭…它只是在等待着被疗愈、呵护，直到重新焕发出色彩。
t_en: Only then can I prove to you that tenacious hope, buried in the deepest part of the human soul, has not been lost to time! It's just waiting to heal and grow, and then it will shine once more.

t_ch: 哪怕是最怯懦的小人物，她的心底也留有一颗种子。或许在你所处的时代，天边的光线过于昏暗，以至于种子未能发芽……
t_en: Even the most cowardly individual harbors a seed within. Perhaps in your era, the light on the horizon was too dim for it to sprout...

t_ch: 但是，你看到了吗？现在，千年以后——由你开辟出的道路上，走出了许多闪闪发光的英雄——
t_en: But do you see it now? A thousand years later, the path you forged is now walked by many brilliant heroes.

t_ch: 他们毫无保留地爱着世人，甘愿舍弃自身为人子洒下光芒。
t_en: They love the people of this world unreservedly, willing to sacrifice themselves to shine a light upon the children of humanity.

t_ch: 他们留下的一道道光束，会促使人们心底的种子萌发嫩芽、长出新叶，并一路滋养着他们，茁壮生长——
t_en: The light they leave behind will inspire the seeds within people to sprout, grow, and thrive, nurturing them every step of the way.

t_ch: 直到枯萎的大地上，重新长出一片蓊郁的森林，它将生生不息，也终有一日…能再度触及天空。
t_en: Until the barren land is reborn as a thriving forest, growing endlessly, and one day... reaching for the sky once again.

t_ch: 那在末世之下亦能被治愈、守护的「昏光」…就是我们选择背负不完美的人性的理由！
t_en: That "twilight," still capable of being healed and protected in the end times... is the reason we choose to bear the weight of humanity's flaws.

t_ch: 历史再次证明了一事：逐火之旅本身就是一场奇迹——
t_en: History has proven once again: The Flame-Chase Journey itself is a miracle —

t_ch: 它以一则被粉饰的谎言为始，却铺下了凡人跨越千年的救世之路。
t_en: It began with a whitewashed lie, but it laid down a path of deliverance for humanity over thousands of years.

t_ch: 塞涅俄丝，我们遵守了那位无名黄金裔对你许下的约定，回到了这里。不仅如此…我们还为你带来了答案——
t_en: Seliose, we have honored the promise made by that nameless Chrysos Heir and returned here. We also bring you the answer to your question —

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>凡人能够接受改变…人性值得被拯救！</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Mortals are capable of change... and humanity is worth saving!</color>

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>这个在末世中砥砺奋进的族类，值得拥有第二次机会——我们配得上一个崭新的黎明！</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>Our people, forging through the trials of the end times, deserve a second chance — we are worthy of a new dawn!</color>

t_ch: 风堇——
t_en: Hyacine —

t_ch: 嗯！索拉比斯、露奈比斯——
t_en: Yes! Solabis, Lunabis —

t_ch: 我们在，雅辛忒丝。
t_en: We are here, Hyacinthia.

t_ch: 我们在，风堇姑娘。
t_en: We are here, Miss Hyacine.

t_ch: 请助我一臂之力吧。因为我已经下定决心，<color=#dbc291ff>我们</color>已经下定决心——
t_en: Give me your strength. I've made my decision, and <color=#dbc291ff>we</color> stand resolved.

t_ch: 为了凡人在万丈足下建立起的一切，我会听从神谕的指引，索取{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}「晨昏之眼」{RUBY_E#}的火种——
t_en: For all that mortals have built, I will follow the guidance of the prophecy and claim the Coreflame of the {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Eye of Twilight{RUBY_E#} —

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>地上的人子已经归来，我们…会再度挑战天空！</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The children of humanity have returned from the earth, and we... will challenge the skies once again!</color>

t_ch: 亲爱的塞涅俄丝启——
t_en: Dear Seliose,

t_ch: 你还好吗？*我们*已经很久没有收到你的回信啦……
t_en: Are you okay? We haven't heard from you in so long...

t_ch: 虽然大概知道你为什么没有回复…但*我们*还是想留下这些话语，万一你能看到它们呢，对吧？
t_en: We think we understand why you haven't replied, but we still wanted to leave these words here, just in case you see them, you know?

t_ch: 恐怕这就是*我们*最后一次给你写信啦。奥莱诺斯陷入了漫长的黑夜，可怕的生物不断从黑潮里涌现，让整座城邦陷入了混乱。
t_en: We are afraid this might be the last letter we ever write to you. Oleinus has sunk into an endless night, with dreadful creatures continuing to surge from the black tide, plunging the entire city in chaos.

t_ch: 此时此刻，我正在努力帮助这里的人们逃离。*我们*打开了许许多多的百界门，把大家传送到了奥赫玛，*我们*的姐妹缇宝的身边……
t_en: Right now, I'm doing everything I can to help people escape. We have been guiding them through the Century Gate, sending them to Okhema, where our sister Tribbie is waiting.

t_ch: 维持百界门，真的是件很累的事情呀…这几天，*我们*感觉自己的身形都变小了好几圈。更别说，奥莱诺斯的领主还在四处搜捕*我们*……
t_en: Maintaining the Century Gate takes everything I have. Lately, it feels like we are getting smaller and smaller. And to make matters worse, the lord of Oleinus is still closing in on us...

t_ch: 但是*我们*还不能停下，因为还有许许多多的人需要救助…
t_en: Yet we can't stop now. There are still so many people who need saving.

t_ch: 要把他们送往安全的地方，让他们远离黑潮的魔爪…这是*我们*必须做的事。无论换做哪位姐妹，她们都一定会做出一样的决定的……
t_en: We have to get them to safety, far from the grasp of the black tide. It's something we can't turn away from. Any of our sisters would make the same choice without a second thought...

t_ch: 亲爱的塞涅俄丝——你成为英雄了吗？*我们*多希望你成功了呀。那样一来，就会有更多的人们相信神谕…并愿意团结在它身边了吧？
t_en: Dear Seliose — have you become a hero? We truly hope you've succeeded. If you have, perhaps more people will believe in the prophecy... and find the strength to stand together because of it.

t_ch: *我们*有些累了，想要小睡一会儿…希望在梦里，*我们*能和妈妈，还有姐妹们团聚呀……
t_en: We are so tired now. Maybe it's time for a little rest... and in our dreams, we will see Mama again, along with all our sisters...

t_ch: ——想念你的，缇宋。
t_en: — Missing you, Trissha

t_ch: 塞涅俄丝拥有弑神的力量……
t_en: Seliose possessed the strength to slay gods...

t_ch: 但她却无法斩除深埋于人子心中的因果。
t_en: Yet, she failed to sever the cycle of karma rooted deeply in humanity's hearts.

t_ch: 她无条件的宽容遭到了无情的背叛。
t_en: Her unconditional tolerance was met with ruthless betrayal.

t_ch: 她对人子深远的爱，烧灼殆尽…徒留无边怒火。
t_en: Her deep love for humanity was reduced to ashes... leaving behind only endless fury.

t_ch: 阿格莱雅……
t_en: Aglaea...

t_ch: 你…还在守护着我们么？
t_en: Are you... still protecting us?

t_ch: 看，艾格勒的火种——
t_en: Look, Aquila's Coreflame —

t_ch: 这样…就算结束了吗？
t_en: Is it... all over now?

t_ch: 塞涅俄丝将凡人定罪，令他们坠入黄金池。最后，她的结局也……
t_en: Seliose condemned humanity, casting them into the pool of gold. In the end, she too was...

t_ch: …带上那枚火种，风堇。我们的使命还没结束。
t_en: ...Take that Coreflame with you, Hyacine. Our mission isn't over.

t_ch: 嗯…天空的火种，跟我走吧……
t_en: Hmm... Coreflame of the sky, come with me...

t_ch: 风堇将火种收入了掌心……
t_en: Hyacine contains the Coreflame in her palm...

t_ch: 真是…奇妙的感觉。很温热，很…强大。
t_en: It's a strange feeling. It's so warm and... powerful.

t_ch: 将它握在掌中，就感觉这世间的风儿都会为我转向…召唤雷云或雨雪，也只在一念之间。
t_en: Holding it in my hand, it feels like the winds of this world might turn for me... Summoning thunder or snow is just a thought away.

t_ch: 我理解你的感受，但现在……
t_en: I understand how you feel, but right now...

t_ch: …这座平台摇摇欲坠，不知道还能支撑多久。得想办法离开。
t_en: ...this platform is on the brink of collapse. Who knows how much longer it can hold. We need to find a way to leave.

t_ch: 看，那边——
t_en: Look, over there —

t_ch: 是岁月祭司的仪器，还残留着神力么？
t_en: A Time Priest's instrument. Does it still have any divine power left?

t_ch: 不知道，只能赌赌看了。如果能用祷言回溯破碎的平台，就能乘着它返回入口。
t_en: No idea, but we have to take a gamble. If the prayer can rewind the shattered platform, then we might ride it back to the entrance...

t_ch: …也能一并取回阿格莱雅的护符。
t_en: ...and also retrieve Aglaea's amulet.

t_ch: 不能再耽搁了。各位，快走！
t_en: We can't delay any longer. Everyone, move quickly!

t_ch: 金线…在颤抖……
t_en: The golden thread... is trembling...

t_ch: 不妙，这台仪器太古旧了，未必能发挥作用……
t_en: This device is too old. It might not work...

t_ch: 没时间了，至少要把它拿回来…{NICKNAME}，快！
t_en: We're out of time. We have to retrieve it... {NICKNAME}, quickly!

t_ch: 欧洛尼斯——
t_en: Oronyx —

t_ch: 我呼唤你——
t_en: I summon thee —

t_ch: 「揭开记忆的帷幕——」
t_en: "Lift the curtain of memory—"

t_ch: 「——激起往昔的涟漪！」
t_en: "—and stir up ripples of past reverie!"

t_ch: 自此，白厄，你将踏上永不复还的征途。
t_en: From here on, Phainon, you shall embark on a journey with no return.

t_ch: 光明之所以会离席，是因为它在静候一颗太阳的升起。
t_en: Light fades only to await the sun's rise.

t_ch: 终有一日，你将不再因为恐惧迈出步伐……
t_en: One day, you will step forward — not out of fear...

t_ch: …而是为了将黎明归还世间。
t_en: ...but to return the dawn to this world.

t_ch: …它就在眼前了。
t_en: ...It's right in front of us.

t_ch: 平台回溯到了头顶…必须想办法上去！
t_en: The platform has reset above us... We need to find a way up!

t_ch: 这边，身后！那道门通向外面——
t_en: This way, behind! That door leads outside —

t_ch: 那里一定还有路可走！
t_en: There's got to be a path!

t_ch: 电闪雷鸣……
t_en: Lightning and thunder...

t_ch: 天象画壁…映照出了世界的末路……
t_en: The Celestial Mural is showing the end of the world.

t_ch: 外面现在怎么样了……
t_en: What's happening out there...?

t_ch: 天象画壁对世间气象的掌控早已被切断了，这里发生的一切不会影响到地上…希望如此。
t_en: The mural's control over the weather was severed long ago. Whatever happens here shouldn't affect the world below... or so I hope.

t_ch: 相反，逐火之旅就要成功了。
t_en: On the contrary, the Flame-Chase Journey is on the verge of success.

t_ch: 艾格勒是逐火之旅的第十一枚火种。而最后一枚刻法勒的火种，就被供奉在黎明云崖的议会中心。
t_en: Aquila is the eleventh Coreflame of the Flame-Chase Journey. The final Coreflame of Kephale is enshrined in the council hall at Dawncloud.

t_ch: 我们离完成奇迹只有一步之遥。凡人会掌控自身的命运……
t_en: We're so close to achieving the miracle. Humanity will finally take control of its fate...

t_ch: …前提是，我们能逃离这里！
t_en: ...as long as we can make it out of here!

t_ch: 平台，就在前方了！
t_en: The platform is just ahead!

t_ch: 风堇——那两头翼兽呢？
t_en: Hyacine, where are those winged beasts?

t_ch: 我在试着寻找他们，但画壁上的风云阻隔了感官……
t_en: I'm trying to locate them, but the storm clouds on the mural are blocking my senses!

t_ch: 如果那两位阁下还在…就能借用他们的翅膀逃离这里了！
t_en: We could use their wings to escape if they were still here!

t_ch: 但眼下只能靠自己的双腿。继续前进吧……
t_en: We'll have to rely on our feet for now. Keep moving...

t_ch: …这里还远谈不上安全！
t_en: ...We're not safe yet!

t_ch: 集中，雅辛忒丝！集中……
t_en: Focus, Hyacinthia! Stay focused...

t_ch: 偏偏在这种时候出此难题……
t_en: Why does this have to happen now...?

t_ch: 没时间了…既然天空堡垒是由艾格勒的神力驱动的，如果我能运用火种……
t_en: We're out of time. The fortress runs on Aquila's divine energy — if I can channel the Coreflame...

t_ch: 成功了！火种响应了呼唤——各位，一起离开这里吧！
t_en: It worked! The Coreflame responded. Everyone, let's get out of here!

t_ch: 大家，站稳了！
t_en: Everyone, hold on tight!

t_ch: 这声音是…怎么可能……
t_en: Isn't that sound... How's that possible...

t_ch: 没时间给我们揣测了……
t_en: No time for speculation...

t_ch: ——快跑！
t_en: — Run!

t_ch: 人子…你们倾覆了我在幻灭中做出的判决啊。
t_en: Children of humanity... you have overturned the judgment I once cast in disillusionment.

t_ch: 以一则<color=#dbc291ff>被粉饰成英雄传说，流传千年的谎言</color>为开篇，写下了壮烈的创世史诗……
t_en: Beginning with <color=#dbc291ff>a lie disguised as a heroic legend, passed down for millennia</color>, a grand epic of creation has been written...

t_ch: …你们，配得上一个崭新的黎明。
t_en: ...You are worthy of a new dawn.

t_ch: 天空之城在坍塌，是艾格勒的陨落导致的？
t_en: Is the Sky Castrum collapsing because of Aquila's fall?

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你要去哪？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, where are you going?

t_ch: 用岁月祭司的仪器回溯平台吧，我们得用它逃离这里！
t_en: Use the Time Priest's instrument to rewind the platform. We have to get out of here!

t_ch: 奇迹宝珠——用它打开逃生的大门吧！
t_en: A Miracle Orb! Let's use it to open our escape route!

t_ch: 那枚宝珠在闪烁…得通过它才能打开大门！
t_en: That orb is blinking... We need to use it to open the gate!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，你能搞定吗？
t_en: {NICKNAME}, can you handle it?

t_ch: 成功了！我们走！
t_en: It worked! Let's go!

t_ch: 白厄，阿格莱雅她……
t_en: Phainon... Aglaea is...

t_ch: 我知道。
t_en: I know.

t_ch: 我…知道……
t_en: I... know...
...Argh!

t_ch: 当心！到处都在崩塌，一不小心就会坠落！
t_en: Watch out! Everything is collapsing, and a misstep could lead to a fall!

t_ch: 这条路恐怕没有看上去那么平坦…当心眼前和脚下！
t_en: This path isn't as safe as it looks... Stay sharp and watch your step!

t_ch: 门柱…塌下来了！
t_en: The door's frame is coming down!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}——帮我们一把！
t_en: {NICKNAME} — give us a hand!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}…你的确擅长拯救世界！
t_en: {NICKNAME}... you do have a knack for saving the world!

t_ch: 不可思议，好身手！
t_en: Unbelievable — you've got some impressive moves!

t_ch: 崩塌…越发剧烈了！
t_en: It's getting worse!

t_ch: 跟紧{NICKNAME}…一步都别落下！
t_en: Stay close to {NICKNAME}... Don't fall behind!

t_ch: 就快到了。终点就在前方，只需要一道彩虹桥……
t_en: We're almost there. The end is just ahead. All we need is a rainbow bridge...

t_ch: 「西风罗盘」…交给我吧！
t_en: A West Wind Compass... leave it to me!

t_ch: 我们都有必须活下去的理由——
t_en: We all have something worth living for —

t_ch: 也都想见证奥赫玛的第二次黎明——
t_en: And we all want to see Okhema's second dawn —

t_ch: 终于…能稍微松一口气了吗？
t_en: Finally... can we catch our breath now?

t_ch: 这座平台就像一座牢笼…但愿不会出什么故障。
t_en: This platform feels like a cage... Let's hope nothing goes wrong.

t_ch: 什么？这是什么声音……
t_en: Wait... what was that sound?

t_ch: 各位——平台一旦停靠下来，我们就立刻冲向出口……
t_en: Everyone — once the platform stops, we make a break for the exit...

t_ch: …一秒都不要犹豫！
t_en: Don't hesitate, not even for a second!

t_ch: 奇迹宝珠——用它打开逃生的大门吧！
t_en: A Miracle Orb! Let's use it to open our escape route!

t_ch: 那颗宝珠…在闪烁！
t_en: That orb is... blinking!?

t_ch: 要抓住它亮起的时机，穿过大门！
t_en: We need to get through the doors when it lights up!

t_ch: 这颗宝珠更加不稳定……
t_en: It's getting even more unstable...

t_ch: 要找准时机呀，大家！
t_en: Make sure you get the timing right!

t_ch: 这天气合你心意吗，泰坦的化身？
t_en: Does this weather please you, Titan incarnate?

t_ch: 那就投你所好，让你尝尝「侵晨」的烈焰吧！
t_en: Indulge in this, and taste the fiery blaze of Dawnmaker!

t_ch: 如果你还能听到我的声音，塞涅俄丝大人——
t_en: If you can still hear my voice, Lady Seliose —

t_ch: 誓言救世之人的力量…请你一定要好好见证！
t_en: Behold the strength of those who've pledged to save the world!

t_ch: Hafau...Deus…
t_en: Hafau... Deus...

t_ch: 温度，在上升——
t_en: The temperature is rising —

t_ch: 要想办法浇灭这股热流！
t_en: We need to find a way to quench this heatwave!

t_ch: 我来劈落，虚假的太阳！
t_en: I shall strike down the false sun!

t_ch: Diya...Gae！
t_en: Diya... Gae!

t_ch: 它…想要将这里烧作焦土！
t_en: They... they want to turn this place to scorched earth!

t_ch: 将火种交予我们吧……
t_en: Give us the Coreflame...

t_ch: …至少，我们能抚慰世界的痛苦！
t_en: ...At least, we can soothe the world's pain!

t_ch: 一鼓作气…斩断它的翅膀！
t_en: Let's finish this! Slice off their wings!

t_ch: 你，也将接受黄金的洗濯！
t_en: You, too, will be cleansed with gold!

t_ch: 平台…在疾速坠落！
t_en: The platform is plummeting fast!

t_ch: 稳住脚下！电梯井很长…赶在坠入黄金池前干掉它！
t_en: Stand firm! It's a long way down... Let's end them before we crash into the pool of gold!

t_ch: Korus...Pamae…
t_en: Korus... Pamae...

t_ch: 雷云在聚集……
t_en: Storm clouds are gathering...

t_ch: 准备好斩断闪电了吗？
t_en: Are you ready to sever the lightning?

t_ch: 雷雨，风暴——同样与我为伍！
t_en: Thunderstorms and tempests walk by my side!

t_ch: Dite...Finis！
t_en: Dite... Finis!

t_ch: 雷电，是它愤怒的悲鸣……
t_en: Thunder and lightning are the cries of their fury...

t_ch: 还有一个世界等着被拯救……
t_en: There is another world waiting to be saved...

t_ch: 我们…不打算在这里和你同归于尽！
t_en: We... have no intention of dying here with you!

t_ch: 那扭曲的形态……
t_en: That twisted form...

t_ch: 是黑潮裹挟着它起死回生了吗？
t_en: Did the black tide bring them back to life?

t_ch: 火种已经被取走了，它却还在行动……
t_en: The Coreflame has been taken, yet they still move...

t_ch: 塞涅俄丝大人，是你吗？
t_en: Lady Seliose, is that you?

t_ch: 畏惧…猩红的天空……
t_en: Fear... the bloodred sky...

t_ch: 我听到了，末日的回响……
t_en: I hear it, the echo of the apocalypse...

t_ch: 停下吧，塞涅俄丝大人！
t_en: Stop, Lady Seliose!

t_ch: 历史…隐入晨昏！
t_en: History... lost in twilight...!

t_ch: 黑暗的末世…必须被照亮……
t_en: We must bring light to these dark times!

t_ch: 火种……
t_en: Coreflame...

t_ch: 赠予我们治愈的虹彩！
t_en: Bestow upon us the healing rainbow!

t_ch: 抓住光亮……
t_en: Seize the light...

t_ch: …我们一起，解放天空！
t_en: ...Together, we shall free the sky!

t_ch: 播下希望……
t_en: Sow the seeds of hope...

t_ch: …以「开拓」，打破诅咒！
t_en: ...Break the curse through Trailblazing!

t_ch: 你的诅咒，从此不再！
t_en: Your curse ends here!

t_ch: 还差一点…一鼓作气吧！
t_en: Almost there... keep the momentum going!

t_ch: 天空的英雄，苏醒过来吧！
t_en: Hero of the sky, awaken!

t_ch: 以人性的坚韧……
t_en: With humanity's tenacity...

t_ch: …否决你的审判！
t_en: ...we reject your judgment!

t_ch: 「侵晨」将要斩落的神明——
t_en: The first and only god that Dawnmaker will slay —

t_ch: 你是首个，也是唯一！
t_en: — is you!

t_ch: 你是…英雄……
t_en: You are... a hero...

t_ch: 千年前，刻法勒祭司的寝宫……
t_en: Thousands of years ago, in the sleeping quarters of Kephale's priests...
Uhh...

t_ch: 值钱的玩意，到底藏在哪儿呢……
t_en: Seriously, where did they hide that thing...

t_ch: 破烂、还是破烂…这是啥？不管了，总之先收着……
t_en: Trash, just trash... What is this? Never mind. I'll take it anyway...

t_ch: …哎唷，终于被我找到了！
t_en: ...Ah, I finally found it!

t_ch: 肯定就是这个！大司铎私藏的「全世宝石」，传说是黎明机器剥落的一部分……
t_en: It must be this! The Gem of All Worlds that the Chaplain secretly stashed away, said to be a fragment peeled from the Dawn Device...

t_ch: 嗅…嗅嗅……
t_en: Sniff... sniff...

t_ch: 嘿嘿…隔着这小盒子我都能闻到上等宝贝的香甜味儿了。什么为信仰奉献一切的大司铎，不还是充实了私人小金库嘛……
t_en: Heh, I can already catch the sweet scent of treasure seeping from this little box. So much for the Chaplain's devotion to faith — it turns out he's just been padding his secret stash...

t_ch: 为了这小玩意，我可是在祭司院蛰伏了大半年啊！每天听那群死板的祭司学徒念经，猫脑都快烧坏了……
t_en: I've been lurking in the Priestly Court for over half a year just for this little trinket! Day after day, listening to those stiff priest apprentices drone on with their prayers. I thought I was going to lose my mind...

t_ch: 得亏「盗道酬勤」，嘿嘿……
t_en: Good thing persistence pays off, heh...

t_ch: 哎我…！
阿提…阿提卡斯…是你吗？
t_en: Atti... Atticus... is that you?

t_ch: （阿提卡斯？这名字耳熟…哦，是他最偏爱的那个祭司学徒吧？人们眼中钦定的下任大司铎……）
t_en: (Atticus? That name rings a bell... Oh, he's the apprentice the Chaplain favors most, the one everyone expects to be the next Chaplain...?)

t_ch: （不接话也不好…先用{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}的力量顶着吧？）
t_en: (Not saying anything would feel awkward... maybe I can hold it together with {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#}'s ability for now?)

t_ch: （现在…*我就是阿提卡斯。*）
t_en: (Now... I am Atticus.)

t_ch: 阿提…卡斯？你为何…不回应……
t_en: Atti...cus? Why aren't you... responding...?

t_ch: *老…咳，大司铎，是我。我是来帮您换药的。*
t_en: Old... ahem, Chaplain, it's me. I'm here to assist you with your medicine.

t_ch: 啊…感谢你。若无你照顾，我早就咽下最后一口气，被{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}收归冥河了……
t_en: Ah... thank you. Without your care, I would've long been claimed by {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} and carried to the River of Souls...

t_ch: *哦…您不用如此客气，恩师。照顾病榻上的您，是我应尽的本分。*
t_en: Oh... no need to thank me, master. It's my duty to care for you while you recover.

t_ch: （这老头，病得比想象中还严重…看来是祭司们在有意隐瞒他的病情哪。）
t_en: (This old man is way sicker than I thought... Looks like the priests are deliberately hiding how bad it really is.)

t_ch: 阿提卡斯…我能感觉到，自己的生命在飞速流逝，不知何时便会坠入永眠……
t_en: Atticus... I can feel my life slipping away, fading faster with every moment. I don't know when eternal sleep will claim me...

t_ch: 所以…最后还有一件事…我必须要告诉你……
t_en: There's one last thing I must tell you...

t_ch: （还有一件事？等会儿，莫非…老家伙还在别处藏了什么宝贝？！我嘞个翻飞之币呀，本姑娘的幸运日来了！）
t_en: (One last thing? Wait... is he hiding more treasures? Holy "Coin of Whimsy"!? Today might just be my lucky day!)

t_ch: （咳，冷静，赛法利娅…你得保持冷静。）
t_en: (Ahem, calm down, Cifera... Just breathe.)

t_ch: *您会好起来的，大司铎，请保持乐观，不要沮丧。*
t_en: Stay strong, Chaplain. Keep your spirits up and don't lose hope.

t_ch: *但是，但是！如果您有重要的事相托…我会全心全意地认真聆听的。*
t_en: If there's anything important you need to say... I'm all ears.

t_ch: 啊…这件事…极不光彩，令我羞愧。但我必须启齿…因为它关乎到你我脚下…这座圣城的存亡啊。
t_en: Ah... it's so disgraceful that it fills me with shame. Yet, I must speak... for it concerns the fate of our holy city below my feet.

t_ch: （关乎这一城人的死活？至于这么夸张吗，我倒要听听是怎么个事……）
t_en: (What? The fate of the city's people? Is it that serious? I must find out more...)

t_ch: 我们全知的天父{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}，它陷入沉默前的一刻…我于黎明云崖听见了它最后的话语……
t_en: The omniscient sky father, {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, before they fell silent... I heard their last words at Dawncloud...

t_ch: 它说：<color=#dbc291ff>神谕已然降世，吾之使命将终，从此归于沉寂——</color>
t_en: They announced: <color=#dbc291ff>The prophecy has arrived, my mission has concluded, and I shall return to silence...</color>

t_ch: （啊对对对——创世神谕，变成一块死石头的泰坦…老生常谈了，还有什么新鲜的？）
t_en: (Oh, the Prophecy of Genesis. The Titan turned to stone... Heard it a thousand times. Old news. What else you got?)

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>永夜将至，但今后三百年…黎明机器将照拂圣城，只待金血人子塑造奇迹……</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>The eternal night is looming, but over the next three hundred years, the Dawn Device will safeguard the holy city, poised for the children of humanity with golden blood to create miracles...</color>

t_ch: （嗯嗯，黎明机器，创世奇迹，陈词滥——）
t_en: (Mmhmm, the Dawn Device, the miracle of Genesis, the usual clichés...)

t_ch: （等、等会儿，那老头刚才是不是说了…<color=#dbc291ff>今后三百年？</color>？）
t_en: (Wait, did he just say... <color=#dbc291ff>"the next three hundred years"</color>?)

t_ch: （…<color=#dbc291ff>今后百年？</color>）
t_en: (...<color=#dbc291ff>the next hundred years</color>?)

t_ch: 我…向所有人隐瞒了天父给出的时限……
t_en: I... have concealed the deadline the sky father set for everyone...

t_ch: 我实在没有勇气…将圣城黎明的倒计时，残忍地刻在公民的心中啊……
t_en: I lacked the courage to carve the countdown to the city's new dawn into the hearts of its people...

t_ch: 阿提卡斯，你…比我勇敢百倍。你能完成…我未曾做到之事吗？
t_en: Atticus, you... are a hundred times more courageous than I am. Can you accomplish... what I could not?

t_ch: 你会把那苦涩的真相…传达给奥赫玛的全城公民吗？
t_en: Will you share this harsh truth... with all the citizens of Okhema?

t_ch: 阿提卡斯…？
t_en: Atticus...?

t_ch: *请放心吧，恩师。我会替您完成这个艰巨的任务…我会补救您的怯懦带来的后果。*
t_en: Rest easy, master. I will shoulder this heavy burden for you... I'll address the fallout of your indecision.

t_ch: 是这样吗，裁缝女？「每个人都是世上独一无二的存在」……
t_en: Is that right, Seamstress? "Everyone in this world is unique in their own way..."

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>我当英雄的机会…终于要来了哪。</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>My moment to be a hero... has finally arrived.</color>

t_ch: …以上，就是我在黎明云崖假扮祭司的经历。虽然有不少艺术加工，但句句属实。
t_en: ...And that was my stint as a priest at Dawncloud. Sure, the story's been slightly embellished, but every word of it is true.

t_ch: 这些可都是不能泄露的天机啊。我从没跟任何人提起过，包括巴特鲁斯那家伙。
t_en: These are secrets that must remain undisclosed. I've never shared them with anyone, not even Bartholos.

t_ch: 能成为第一位幸运听众，你应该感到万分荣幸才对。
t_en: You should feel incredibly honored to be the first to hear this.

t_ch: …唉，可惜你们现在既不能鼓掌，也发表不了评论了。
t_en: ...Unfortunately, you can't clap or comment right now.

t_ch: 不过这都是小事！能把在心里憋了一千年的秘密一股脑都说出来，我现在可是痛快得很哪。
t_en: But that's beside the point! Getting to spill the secret I've been holding in for a thousand years feels amazing right now.

t_ch: 可话说回来，我是真没想到你们这些家伙会这么执着……
t_en: Honestly, I'm surprised at your persistence...

t_ch: 我不过故意卖了个破绽，<color=#dbc291ff>让你们看到了我把火种偷梁换柱的一幕…</color>怎料想各位真敢一路尾随我跑到冥滩来啊？
t_en: I merely staged a slip-up <color=#dbc291ff>for you to witness the switch of the Coreflame...</color> Who'd have thought you'd follow me all the way to the Nethershore?

t_ch: 还真被那救世小子说中了。你们这些被奥赫玛人排挤的杂碎，已经不得不一条路走到黑了……
t_en: That Deliverer kid was spot-on. You rejects, shunned by the Okhemans, have no choice but to keep moving down this dark path...

t_ch: 一，二，三，四…唔……
t_en: One, two, three, four... wait...

t_ch: 怎么回事，你们的头儿…那个叫凯妮斯的女人，好像不在这儿呢？莫非她还有什么别的计划……
t_en: What's going on? Your leader Caenis isn't here? Could she be plotting something else?

t_ch: 唉，真麻烦…算了，为了大家好，我还是检查下各位身上有没有什么可疑物件吧。
t_en: Ah, such a hassle... Well, for everyone's safety, I might as well check if you're carrying anything suspicious.

t_ch: 这制服谁设计的？口袋真多…现在早就不流行这种款式了吧？
t_en: Who came up with this uniform? It's got more pockets than it needs. Nobody wears this style anymore, do they?

t_ch: 当年在「金织」打正经工的时候，我倒是见过不少这种……
t_en: Back in the days when I was doing honest work for the Goldweaver, I saw my fair share of these...

t_ch: 啊，有了！这是啥？
t_en: Oh, what do we have here?

t_ch: …接头传纸条？这通讯方式未免太原始了吧……
t_en: ...A paper note? Talk about old school...

t_ch: 啊，对哦…裁缝女的神职消散以后，「万帷网」的速度直接从5线退化到2线年代了……
t_en: Oh, right... once the seamstress's powers diminished, the World Wound Web slowed drastically, from five threads to just two...

t_ch: 看来是我错怪你们了——2线网速确实还赶不上肉身传书呢。
t_en: Looks like I was too quick to judge — physical note-passing still outpaces the reduced threads.

t_ch: 匕首看着不错，让我瞅瞅……
t_en: This dagger's got a nice look to it. Let's see it...

t_ch: 唷，居然是悬锋钢的——这帮家伙的装备还挺精良。
t_en: Wow, it's crafted from Kremnoan steel — these people are well-equipped.

t_ch: 以普通人的标准衡量，几位的身手也算不错了。你们要是没误入歧途，怎么也能在奥赫玛当个守城卫士，领个铁饭碗吧？
t_en: By any standard, you all are quite capable. Had you not strayed, you could have been guarding Okhema, securing a stable income.

t_ch: 可惜呀可惜…来世记得好好做人，别再干这种危险行当了。
t_en: Such a pity... In your next life, remember to choose a safer path, and stay away from dangerous jobs like this.

t_ch: 面具之下到底藏着何种面孔，就让我来瞅瞅——
t_en: Let me take a look at what's hidden under that mask —

t_ch: 嗯…脸上倒是挺干净的。要是不戴面具，谁能想到这幅皮囊下面居然藏着那么险恶的杀心……
t_en: Hmm... your face looks innocent enough. Who would've guessed that such a pretty face would hide a heart full of darkness?

t_ch: 所以说嘛，怎么可能单凭面相就判断出一个人的品性优劣？不靠谱，根本不靠谱。
t_en: Appearances can be deceiving. It's a fool's game to judge someone's character just by their looks.

t_ch: 还真羡慕裁缝女的神权哪，没法从面相上看出来的品性，交给金线判断就行了。
t_en: It's amazing what the seamstress can do with her divine authority. She sees right through people with that golden thread of hers, beyond whatever facade they put up.

t_ch: 不过，要论神力的运用…我也不差，哈！
t_en: As for using divine powers... I'm no slouch myself!

t_ch: 唔…没有那凯妮斯的线索啊。不知道她是藏得太深，还是已经放弃治疗了？
t_en: Hmm... no trace of Caenis. Is she hiding too well, or has she given up?

t_ch: 嗐，反正我该做的都已经做了。接下来，就只等救世小子他们……
t_en: Well, I've done everything I could. Now it's in the hands of the Deliverer and his crew...

t_ch: 哈？！那是——
t_en: Huh!? What was that —

t_ch: 动静是从天边传来的，莫非……
t_en: The noise came from above, could it be...

t_ch: 哈…看来他们成功了啊。
t_en: Ha... it looks like they pulled it off.

t_ch: 有点实力嘛，救世小子——不过，这功劳也得记在那天外来的灰子身上吧？
t_en: The Deliverer's impressive, no doubt, but some of the credit should go to that Gray Mystery from beyond the sky.

t_ch: 我见识过，那家伙虽然性格有点…幽默，但实力也是强得惊人哪。
t_en: I've crossed paths with them before. They're a little quirky, but their power? Absolutely terrifying.

t_ch: 既然艾格勒的火种也被带走了，那么……
t_en: With the Coreflame of Aquila taken...

t_ch: …逐火之旅的威胁，也就只剩下一个了。
t_en: ...the Flame-Chase Journey is down to its final threat.

t_ch: 哎…来得还真快哪，那家伙…都不给我点时间做心理准备。
t_en: Ah... they're already here. Barely gave me a moment to catch my breath.

t_ch: 那么…就由本姑娘来会会你吧？
t_en: Alright then... Guess it's my turn to see what you've got!

t_ch: 唷！你来啦？恭候多时！
t_en: Oh! You made it? I've been waiting for you!

t_ch: 黑衣剑士，盗火行者，管你叫什么名字——
t_en: Black-clad swordmaster, the Flame Reaver, whatever your name is —

t_ch: 你果真就像一条饿坏了的鬣狗…循着火种的气味追来了哪！
t_en: Look at you, sniffing around like a starving hyena... chasing the scent of the Coreflames!

t_ch: 不说话？还是懒得说话？又或者…你真的跟条蠢狗一样，连人话都听不明白？
t_en: What's wrong? Cat got your tongue? Or maybe you're just too dense to understand plain speech?

t_ch: {RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}「全世之座」{RUBY_E#}…火种……
t_en: {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Throne of Worlds{RUBY_E#}... Coreflame...

t_ch: 必须…夺还……
t_en: Must... take back...

t_ch: 嘻嘻…悲哀的家伙，我已经摸透你了哪！
t_en: You sad little thing, I've got you all figured out!

t_ch: 让我猜猜——你其实一直在打最后这两颗火种的主意吧？
t_en: Let me guess — you've been eyeing these last two Coreflames all along, huh?

t_ch: 只可怜你一没得翅膀，二没得同伴…所以，哪怕艾格勒的火种就被放在天上，哪儿也没去——
t_en: No wings, no allies... what a pity. Even with Aquila's Coreflame sitting idly in the sky, you're helpless to reach it.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>你也只能苦苦等着黄金裔们把火种带回地上，然后再靠蛮力强取豪夺…对吧？</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>All you can do is sit and wait for the Chrysos Heirs to bring it down, then swoop in like a brute to snatch it for yourself, isn't that so?</color>

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈，被我戳中痛处了吧！好几次了，我远远望着你站在悬崖边，无助地四十五度仰头望天…那景象，真是好凄惨呀！
t_en: Hah! Struck a nerve, have I? I've seen you lingering on a cliff more than once, staring hopelessly at the sky. Pathetic.

t_ch: 为了给你这条孤寡老狗一点关怀，今天我给你准备了一件特别大礼哦……
t_en: But hey, I'm feeling generous today — I've got a surprise just for you.

t_ch: …<color=#dbc291ff>没错！刻法勒的火种就在我身上。</color>
t_en: ...<color=#dbc291ff>That's right! I have Kephale's Coreflame.</color>

t_ch: 但想把它从猫儿手里抢走……
t_en: But if you think you can snatch it from my claws...

t_ch: …就试着追上她吧！
t_en: ...you'll have to catch me!

t_ch: 哎唷！你怎、你是怎么跑到我前面去的？！
t_en: Ow! How... how did you get ahead of me!?

t_ch: 停！停停停，别砍我，别！
t_en: Whoa, whoa, whoa! Don't swing that thing — easy there!

t_ch: 你不就是想要刻法勒的火种嘛？拿去，给你！都是那救世小子让我偷来的，这玩意对我根本没用！
t_en: You're after Kephale's Coreflame, aren't you? Fine, take it! The Deliverer made me steal it! It's no use to me anyway!

t_ch: 看在，呃…看在咱们都喜欢黑色穿搭的份上…你就留可怜的猫咪一条小命吧？
t_en: Look, uh... since we've got the same taste in fashion — all black and sleek — how about you spare this poor cat's life?

t_ch: 对对对，就是这样！火种、你拿去；小命，我留下……
t_en: That's the spirit! You get the Coreflame, and I get to keep breathing — everyone wins!

t_ch: 火…种……
t_en: Core... flame...

t_ch: …哈哈哈！果然是条蠢到不行的流浪狗！
t_en: Haha! You really are a brainless mutt, aren't you?

t_ch: 汪，汪汪！来呀，扔到嘴边的骨头飞了，你不会这么轻易就放弃了吧？
t_en: Woof, woof! Come on. Come on, you're not gonna let a little setback like a lost bone stop you, are you?

t_ch: （…话是这么说，可我居然被追上了？这还是头一回……）
t_en: (...Well, look at that. They actually caught up with me. No one's ever managed that before...)

t_ch: 好久没跑得这么过瘾了，你高低得多坚持一会儿，至少让我把筋骨活动开嘛！
t_en: It's been a while since I've had a chase this good. Don't quit on me now — I'm just getting into the groove!

t_ch: 好猫不走回头路——别跑错方向了喂！
t_en: A wise cat doesn't look back. Don't run in the wrong direction!

t_ch: 什么啊，居然还没到，扫兴。
t_en: What? Still not here? Well, that's disappointing.

t_ch: 既然如此，那我就……
t_en: Oh well, I guess I'll just...

t_ch: *…再等上你一阵！*
t_en: ...wait around a little longer for you!

t_ch: *太美丽了，斯缇科西亚…哎唷，这不盗火行者吗？*
t_en: Styxia, you're stunning... Oh? Look who it is — the Flame Reaver!

t_ch: *初次…哦不对，多次见面，我是奥赫玛的大英雄，翁法罗斯的救世主！*
t_en: First time — wait, no, not the first time meeting you. I'm the great hero of Okhema, the Deliverer of Amphoreus!

t_ch: *他们都说，我是注定要归还刻法勒的火种，然后在新世界背负天地的大英雄……*
t_en: They say I'm destined to return Kephale's Coreflame and carry the weight of a new world on my shoulders...

t_ch: *不过，我这个人的特点，就是公平、公平、还是*多洛斯粗话*的公平！你想要火种？那就来拿吧！前提是，你得先堂堂正正地战胜我！*
t_en: But hey, fairness is my thing — fairness, fairness, and *Dolos profanity* fairness! You want the Coreflame? Come and get it! But only if you beat me fair and square!

t_ch: *唉，无聊…演瘾上来了，我还想着你能稍微陪我玩一会儿呢。*
t_en: Ugh, boring... I was hoping you'd at least humor me for a little while.

t_ch: 蠢狗就是蠢狗，居然能被同一个套路骗上两回……
t_en: Stupid mutt. Fooled by the same trick twice...

t_ch: …拜拜，「盗火行者」！
t_en: ...Bye-bye, "Flame Reaver"!

t_ch: 唉，没想象中那么好玩…毕竟对面是个没理智的疯子，不擅长勾心斗角的游戏哪。
t_en: Sigh... Not as fun as I'd hoped. I guess a brainless brute isn't much fun when it comes to mind games.

t_ch: （不过…真的甩不掉它吗？太不可理喻了。）
t_en: (I... seriously can't shake them off, huh... This is borderline impossible)

t_ch: （那家伙肯定没那么容易善罢甘休，既然如此……）
t_en: (They're not going to back off anytime soon... Well then...)

t_ch: （…就把它引向高处吧？）
t_en: (...Guess I'll just have to lead it somewhere higher.)

t_ch: 计划不能乱…把那疯狗引到高处去吧！
t_en: The plan can't fall apart... lead that mutt up high!

t_ch: 你还是打算前往黎明云崖吗…赛法利娅？
t_en: Cifera... Do you still plan to go to Dawncloud?

t_ch: 嗯，我决定好了。可别想着阻止我啊，裁缝女。
t_en: Hmm, I've made up my mind. Don't think about stopping me, Seamstress.

t_ch: 是为了「全世宝石」…？
t_en: Is it for the Gem of All Worlds?

t_ch: 是不是，重要吗？反正你永远猜不出我的话是真是假。
t_en: Does it even matter? You'll never guess whether I'm lying or telling the truth.

t_ch: 你…还穿着我送给你的那双金靴啊。
t_en: You're still wearing those golden boots I gave you.

t_ch: 希望下次，你踏着它奔跑时…不再是为了逃脱他人的追捕。
t_en: I hope you're not running from someone the next time you wear them...

t_ch: 阿格莱雅…你看到了吗？
t_en: Aglaea... did you see that?

t_ch: 没人能追得上我，我早就不再为「逃亡」而奔跑了。
t_en: No one can catch up to me. I'm no longer running to escape anymore.
*sigh* ...

t_ch: 阴魂不散，形容的就是你这家伙吧？
t_en: You just don't know when to quit, do you?

t_ch: 无法逃离……
t_en: Can't escape...

t_ch: 这是…宿命……
t_en: This... is fate...

t_ch: 「宿命」？哼，我还以为只有养尊处优的城里人爱把这词挂在嘴边，好像没了这两个字当借口，日子就过不下去了一样。
t_en: Fate? Hmph, I always thought only privileged city dwellers liked to toss that word around, as if they couldn't get by without using it as an excuse.

t_ch: 轮回……
t_en: Cycles...
